example_tasks: Curate list of essential reading materials
Flag important client emails for follow-up
Group related research papers into a collection
Highlight key takeaways from the meeting
Bookmark critical documentation for the new API
Select top candidates for the design role
Feature the best photos in the portfolio
Mark essential tasks for daily review
Organize favorite recipes for meal planning
Collect inspiration for the UI redesign
Create a list of must-watch technical talks
Curate a list of recommended software tools
reasoning: The icon combines a star (symbolizing importance or favorites) with a stack (symbolizing a collection or group). It is highly effective for tasks that involve curating, prioritizing, or grouping items of significance.
